entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes used for grain production and primary source of dietary proteins in developing countries

entities.name: DIETARY PROTEINS
entities.description: Essential proteins provided by grain legumes to combat malnutrition

entities.name: PROTEIN HUNGER
entities.description: A state of deficiency in dietary protein widespread in developing countries

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition resulting from a lack of proper nutrition, including protein deficiency

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources preserved in genebanks for crop improvement

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: Global organization managing a significant portion of legume accessions

entities.name: NATIONAL GENEBANK COLLECTIONS
entities.description: National-level repositories for preserving crop genetic resources

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: Nutritional and physical characteristics of the grain

entities.name: MORPHO-AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Physical and growth-related characteristics of crops used for characterization

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL EVALUATION
entities.description: Process of analyzing chemical components to identify nutritionally rich and genetically diverse germplasm

entities.name: CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Systematic subsets of germplasm designed to be manageable for breeders

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Further reduced subsets of germplasm for efficient screening of variation

entities.name: VARIATION
entities.description: Genetic differences within a species or population used for crop improvement

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: Use of molecular tools to identify genetic traits and structure of diversity

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: Method to link genetic markers to specific traits to facilitate use of collections

entities.name: LEGUME DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of genetic variation within legume species

entities.name: HIGH RESOLUTION ELEVATIONAL CLIMATE MODELS
entities.description: Tools used to characterize plant habitats and adaptive responses to stresses

entities.name: PLANT HABITATS
entities.description: The natural environment and ecological conditions where plants grow

entities.name: ADAPTIVE RESPONSES
entities.description: The ability of plants to adjust and survive in response to environmental stresses

entities.name: STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental pressures that affect plant growth and survival

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Non-domesticated species related to crop legumes used to enhance genetic bases

entities.name: MUTAGENESIS
entities.description: Process of inducing genetic mutations to create new genetic resources

entities.name: LEGUME CULTIGENS
entities.description: Domesticated legume varieties used in agriculture
